recommendations.title: Red Hot Riding Hood
recommendations.overview: Tired of always playing the same roles, Little Red Riding Hood, her grandmother and the Wolf demand a new version of the tale. The story then plays out in a more contemporary urban environment, with Little Red Riding Hood working as a pin-up girl in

recommendations.title: Cinderella
recommendations.overview: Cinderella has faith her dreams of a better life will come true. With help from her loyal mice friends and a wave of her Fairy Godmother's wand, Cinderella's rags are magically turned into a glorious gown and off she goes to the Royal Ball. But when
recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson

recommendations.title: Hoodwinked!
recommendations.overview: Little Red Riding Hood: A classic story, but there's more to every tale than meets the eye. Before you judge a book by its cover, you've got to flip through the pages. In the re-telling of this classic fable, the story begins at the end of the tale a

recommendations.title: The Big Bad Wolf
recommendations.overview: The Big Bad Wolf torments Little Red Riding Hood and the Three Little Pigs.

recommendations.title: Descendants: The Rise of Red
recommendations.overview: After the Queen of Hearts incites a coup on Auradon, her rebellious daughter Red and Cinderella's perfectionist daughter Chloe join forces and travel back in time to try to undo the traumatic event that set Red's mother down her villainous path.

recommendations.title: Midnight in Paris
recommendations.overview: While on a trip to Paris with his fiancée's family, a nostalgic screenwriter finds himself mysteriously going back to the 1920s every day at midnight.

recommendations.title: Batman: Under the Red Hood
recommendations.overview: One part vigilante, one part criminal kingpin, Red Hood begins cleaning up Gotham with the efficiency of Batman, but without following the same ethical code.

recommendations.title: Freeway
recommendations.overview: Following the arrest of her mother, Ramona, young Vanessa Lutz decides to go in search of her estranged grandmother. On the way, she is given a ride by school counselor Bob Wolverton. During the journey, Lutz begins to realize that Bob is the notorio

recommendations.title: Dobrinya and the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Dobrinya Nikitich goes on a quest to save the royal niece and finds out whether his old friend Zmey Gorinich is loyal to him. During the adventures, he is accompanied by the royal messenger who's in love with the royal niece.

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
